name: Selection of Fresh Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. For a canner load of 7 quarts, plan on using an average of 14 pounds of cucumbers.
2. For a canner load of 9 pints, plan on using an average of 9 pounds of cucumbers.
3. One bushel (48 pounds) of cucumbers will yield approximately 16 to 24 quarts, or about 2 pounds per quart.
4. Select firm cucumbers of the appropriate size: about 1-1/2 inches for gherkins and 4 inches for dills.
5. Use odd-shaped and more mature cucumbers for relishes and bread-and-butter style pickles.
